notes: Core Galaga mechanics are present (formation, diving, tractor beam, challenging stages) but the entry animation is janky, dual-ship mode is incomplete, and the updateBeat function is defined twice causing a shadowing issue; visuals use abstract shapes rather than authentic Galaga sprites but are recognizable.

Core shooting, formations, dives, scoring, stages, and a challenge stage exist, but several Galaga-specific behaviors are simplified or flawed, pause/game-over rendering logic is inconsistent, and there are code-quality issues that make this clearly short of a polished faithful build.
